mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE ctg_tree AS ( SELECT CTG_NO, UP_CTG_NO, CTG_LVL, CTG_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN FROM PR_CTG_BASE WHERE UP_CTG_NO IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.CTG_NO, c.UP_CTG_NO, c.CTG_LVL, c.CTG_NM, c.SORT_ORD, c.USE_YN FROM PR_CTG_BASE c INNER JOIN ctg_tree ct ON c.UP_CTG_NO = ct.CTG_NO ) SELECT CTG_NO, UP_CTG_NO, CTG_LVL, CTG_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN FROM ctg_tree ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PR_CTG_BASE (UP_CTG_NO, CTG_LVL, CTG_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{upCtgNo}, #{ctgLvl}, #{ctgNm}, #{sortOrd}, 'Y', #{regId}, #{modId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PR_CTG_BASE SET CTG_NM = #{ctgNm}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd}, MOD_DTM = NOW(), MOD_ID = #{modId} WHERE CTG_NO = #{ctgNo}
